creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to SBB from comment #0)
I am exactly not sure on the purpose of building this application like based on what call this port was built because you have not shared that in this case here. But so far from the log I can see that you have a line like this:

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5 perl5=5.34 pgsql=12 php=7.4 python=3.9 python3=3.9 mysql=10.5m

Which might cause the failure. If you share like as part of what DEPENDS this port was called for build I can share some more insight. But do remember that unlike python php cannot have concurrent installations of different versions.
